S.FORM: = John Magufuli = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 10 jiyax 29 ka John Magufuli ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Tanzania ta sayang o kiya ka John Magufuli, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 11 jiyax 5 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟoħn magu*uli = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ɟoħn magu*uli ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tan*ania ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟoħn magu*uli, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = John Magufuli = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 10 jiyax 29 ka John Magufuli ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Tanzania ta sayang o kiya ka John Magufuli, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 11 jiyax 5 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
